headline: Ex-Couple's 'Custody Battle' Is Over A Plant They Bought Together 3 Years Ago
summary: Fernando the Ficus has been subpoenaed. He's not doing well.
fullBody: Emma and Jake Plantimony are fighting for custody of their shared houseplant, Fernando. 'I bought him,' Emma claims. 'I named him,' Jake counters. The plant has been relocated to a neutral location (a Starbucks) pending trial. Fernando is reportedly 'drooping under the pressure.' A plant psychologist has been called in. The judge has asked both parties to 'touch grass' — but not Fernando. He's evidence.
